notes: Lane A proxy matrix. Run the 524288 points first, pick the better compile mode, then continue to higher batch sizes only for that lane-winning compile mode.
purpose: Throughput-first proxy sweep for the legacy seq2048 control on 4xA100.
success_criteria: Find the best Lane A proxy point by lower post-export val_bpb, then higher train_tokens_seen, then lower pre_post_gap.
